prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第8名（Top10），近年稳居全国前十；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、师德 师风、学校管理等多起舆情事件（共99条，负面64条）；抖音热度排名第19（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度仍高；第五轮学科评估A-及以上22个，其中 法学A+、测绘科学与技术A+、地球物理学A+、马克思主义理论A+、生物学A、水利工程A等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业持续高热推荐，与武大优势学科高度重合；本省2026年物理类考生估算约20.4万人，较2025年增加约6.1%，竞争加剧；武汉大学位于湖北，非本省高校，在福建无显著地域偏好优势；2025年在福建物理类招生115人，占比较小，跨省报考竞争主要取决于学校层次与专业吸 引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅缩招（-17.4%）降低门槛、本省考生增加（+6.1%）加剧竞争、声誉偏负面但抖音高热关注度不减、优势学科与热 门专业高度匹配等因素，缩招的降门槛效应略大于考生增加的升竞争效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约1794名，区间1590–1998名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2341→1771→1899→1710→2036. Over the past 5 years, it fluctuated within the range of 1700–2400. The baseline for 2025 is about 2036, which is a significant backward shift of about 326 places compared to 2024. The planned enrollment from 2021 to 2024 was 104→104→103→106, increasing to 115 in 2025. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 95, a reduction of 20 students (-17.4%) compared to 2025, which is a substantial reduction, theoretically lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 8th (Top 10), consistently among the top ten in recent years. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is relatively negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management (99 total, 64 negative). Its Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure and still high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 22 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Law, A+ in Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, A+ in Geophysics, A+ in Marxist Theory, A in Biology, A in Water Conservancy Engineering, etc. The discipline strength is strong, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in this province is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in Hubei, not a local university in Fujian, so it has no significant regional preference advantage in Fujian. In 2025, it enrolled 115 Physics Category students in Fujian, a relatively small proportion. Cross-provincial application competition mainly depends on the school level and major attractiveness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-17.4%) lowering the threshold, the increase in local candidates (+6.1%) intensifying competition, the negative reputation but high Douyin attention, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the threshold-lowering effect of enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the competition-increasing effect of candidate increase. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1794, with a range of 1590–1998.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 1794, with a range of 1590–1998. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1590) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Lei Jun Class and Hongyi College. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 1700–1900) should mainly consider Tier 2 majors such as Computer Class, Law, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (1998) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Engineering Experimental Class and Economics Class as safety options, while also paying attention to relatively lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety and teacher ethics. 预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the slight backward shift in 2025 rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, increased local candidates (+6.3%) intensifying competition, negative reputation but high Douyin attention, and top disciplines like Law continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly move back compared to 2025.
